content:
# Capillary Desaturation Curve

**Summary**: A plot of residual oil saturation versus capillary number to identify the threshold for oil mobilization.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jameel|Jameel, 2024]] generated capillary desaturation curves (CDC) to interpret the dominant microscopic recovery mechanisms.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-jameel|Jameel, 2024]] Used to determine at what point viscous forces overcome capillary forces.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-jameel|Jameel, 2024]] Derived from core flooding data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The CDC highlights the flow conditions necessary for effective oil displacement within porous media. ([[2024-jameel|Jameel, 2024, p. 41]])
